name: Voyager (Spotify's HNSW ANN Library)

performance.notes: HNSW-based; competitive with hnswlib; Spotify production-tested

agent_readiness.notes: Spotify's HNSW nearest neighbor library. from voyager import Index, Space. index = Index(Space.Cosine, num_dimensions=128). index.add_items(vectors). labels, distances = index.query(query, k=10). Save/load: index.save('index.voy'). Thread-safe reads. Memory-mapped files for large indexes. Type annotations. Simple API similar to hnswlib but with better Python ergonomics. Used in production at Spotify for music recommendation. Java and Python bindings.

gotchas: Less community resources than faiss or hnswlib
Spotify-internal use case; less diverse benchmark data
best_when: Production-tested HNSW ANN with clean Python API
When hnswlib's API feels too low-level
Memory-mapped large indexes for production deployment
Java + Python polyglot systems (both bindings available)
avoid_when: When FAISS ecosystem (IndexIVF, product quantization) is needed
summary: Voyager is Spotify's production-tested HNSW nearest neighbor library. Index(Space.Cosine, num_dimensions=128); add_items(vectors); query(q, k=10). Clean Python API with type annotations. Memory-mapped files for large indexes. Thread-safe. Java and Python bindings. Used for music recommendation at Spotify scale. Good alternative to hnswlib with better ergonomics. No GPU support.
